'''Igitz''' were a [[Species/Legends|species]] of small [[Amphibian/Legends|amphibians]] hailing from the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]. Those [[Color/Legends|blue]]-skinned, [[Diet/Legends|omnivorous]] critters dwelled in the planet's many dense [[Swamp/Legends|swamps]]. Because of the environment in which they had evolved, the igitz were well-adapted to both land and [[Water/Legends|water]]: while their front paws were clawed for treading on land, their hindquarters were finned, allowing it speed when in water. The igitz were a popular pet in most [[Gungan/Legends|Gungan]] civilizations.<ref name="GF" /> [[Unidentified New Republic Gungan diplomat|A certain]] Gungan [[Diplomat/Legends|diplomat]] of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] owned one. The diplomat often traveled with his pet igitz to the galactic [[Capital/Legends|capital]] of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]], transporting it in a [[vivarium]] shaped like a Gungan [[Hydrostatic bubble/Legends|hydrostatic bubble]].<ref name="SWFG">''[[The Wildlife of Star Wars: A Field Guide]]''</ref>
